TITANIC AUDITIONS ARE IN ONE WEEK, COME AUDITION!

In Person Auditions: June 22 & 23 (5-8pm), At The Avon Free Public Library; 281 Country Club Road Avon, CT 06001, Board Room, 2nd Floor. Or Online Submission.

Come audition for the story about what happened on the Titanic. This special immersive production will be held in beautiful outdoor nautical gardens. All roles open, everyone is welcome to audition.

Rehearsals: July 7 July 8, July 12, July 21. July 22, July 28, July 29, August 4, August 5, August 9, & August 11 - 5:00 pm - 8:00 pm / Till Dusk, at 92 Pinnacle Rd, Farmington, CT 06032 (Outside Venue.)

Performance Date: August 16, 2pm. Performance Space: 92 Pinnacle Rd, Farmington, CT 06032. Volunteer, Non Union, No Travel or Board Provided.

Sign up Here: [https://forms.gle/87VRcCa6HVk4bSJ28](https://forms.gle/87VRcCa6HVk4bSJ28?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExaDU1VkJYaFNIMEQ0RHZNSXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR4mtr1o0pyFedAQ6QwUXH016O1fQT0H-rBawEOu7rCiUnSPI9pwkttPnrXdjg_aem_o477k7Cxl0P-DNikT4FyYw)

sharedPost.text:
Casting : "Maybe its love, maybe not"
Wanted !!!!!
I am Thomas Goersch from Stuttgart Germany. 
Actor and Filmdirector. 
I am making Independent Movies.
I present my movies on International Film festivals and was lucky to receive some awards. 
But the work is not about awards and money, its about making movies for the people to think about.
My next movie is a modern love story:
An elderly man is meeting another younger, very attractive man in the Internet. But they are from different Continents. They start a long distance relastionship ship. which is full of passion and desire. 
One day the younger man starts to ask for money, cause he is a Student and no more able to pay his bills. 
The older man is full of distrust.
Is he only there to pay his lovers bills or is there love between them ?
A story with two endings.
One with true love and one with only cheating. Based on a real story.
I am looking for the young attraktive Lover.
Men 25 to 36 years old, good looking who is able to film his parts on his own by smartshone
I am always open and honest. You can earn no money on this. but maybe there is a good film in the end promoting for you.
I guess its not necessary that an educated actor is playing this part. so feel free to get in touch
Thats me 
www.imdb.com/name/nm1591928
Get in touch under Thomas.Goersch@vodafonemail.de 
please ask for details.

Please check the images for further details :)

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'YOUTOPIA PROJECT TYPE: PRQJECTYPESHORTFILMMAMM21 SHORT FILM (MAMM21 OFFICIAL SELECTION) PRODUCTION PRODUCTIONTEAMEYOUTOPIA TEAM: OUTOPIA DIRECTOR: JUN LEE PRODUCER: PRODUCER:EUNCHE! EUNCHE LEE COMP COMPENSATION: HONORARIOUM+COPY. CREDIT, MEALS PROVIDED AUDITION/ METHOD: SELF-TAPE(FIRSTRO ELF-TAPE(FIRSTROUNDIHIN-PERSON CALLBACK (TBD) DEADLINE: JUNE 20,2026 EMAIL: SHORTFILMY SHORTFILMYOUTOPIA@GMAIL.COM OUTOPIA SUBJECT LINE FORMAT YOUTOPIA] ROLE NAME - NAME SHOOTING DATE: JULY 17 JULY 19'

May be a graphic of text that says 'SYNOPSIS An outsider immigrant actress in Vancouver, pushed to the absolute edge of financlal and psychologlcal survival. accepts a bizarre, high-paying transactional contract from an affluent matrlarch. Her assignment is not to act in a film, but to step Into real life and flawlessly embody the Identity of a deceased girl unde er rigid behavioral parameters. YOUTOPIA is a sterile, slow-burn psychological thriller that Interrogates the chilling boundarles between performance,class formance, class erasing, and raw human survival.'

May be a graphic of text that says 'JD Supporting Male 30s Any Ethnicity Description: Margaret's elegant, analytical associate who evaluates Soo not as a human belng, but as a high-stakes business commodity. Polished, sophisticated, and ruthlessly transactional, JD Is the quality-control Inspector of thls bizarre simulation. Every look he gives Soo silent, micro-appralsal her performance, calculating whether she yields a return on investment and driving her deeper into the caAe. Performance Note: Requires elite screen presence mastery over silent acting. Must be capable of generating intense, uncomfortable suspense through cold, critical glances and sharp demeanor.'

items.text:
Paid casting call in Chicago searching for male actor and Child actors!
Thanks everyone! We are DePaul directing major MFA students, doing our master degree thesis short film. 

Please let me know if you are interested or know anyone! Paid. 

COMPENSATION : Paid / Stipend + Meals + Credit + Copy

SHOOT DATES: July 17-27,2026 (specific dates depend on role)

Email us: jessica.jin.post@gmail.com

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of macrame and text

May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL KNOTS SEEKING PIETRO Male, late 30s-mid 40s For a student thesis short fil Pietro is the father of Sebastian and Samuel. Tired, loving, and overwhelmed, he is trying to hold the family together on the day th leave for Italy. He is practical caring, but emotionally stretch thin. Looking for an actor with warmth, restraint, and a grounded presence. Shoot Dates: day between July 17-27 Location: Chicago area Compensation: Paid, stipend copy meals credit Submit headshot, resume, and self-tape to: jessica.jin.post@gmail.com'

May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL SEEKING: SEBASTIAN For Male, student thesis short film Sebastian. Quiet, guarded, and emotionally mature in some ways, but still very much child. On the day his family is leaving for Italy, he secretly sets out to visit his mother' grave before too late. He loves deeply, but he hides everything behind silence, distance, and anger. Looking for an actor who can carry emotion through stillness, looks, and small behavior. Shoot Dates: days between July 17-27 Location: area Compensation: Paid stipend +copy meals credit Submit headshot, resume, and self to: jessica.jin.post@gmail.com (For minors, submissions must come from parent/guardian.)'
May be an image of text

একই ছাদের তলায় অভিনয় প্রশিক্ষণ , অডিশন এবং যোগ্য ছাত্রছাত্রীদের সারাজীবন অডিশনের মাধ্যমে সরাসরি কাজের সুযোগ

✨ WE’RE HIRING ✨
Happily Ever After Princesses is looking for magical new performers to join our royal team! 👑

Do you love bringing fairytales to life? We’re on the lookout for talented, reliable, and passionate performers who can sing, sparkle, and make dreams come true.

📩 To apply, please send the following to happilyeverafterprincesses1@gmail.com:
💫 Your CV
🎤 A singing reel
📸 A recent headshot

Applications are now open — we can’t wait to meet our next princess! 💕

#PrincessPerformer #CastingCall #NowHiring #PrincessJobs #happilyeverafterprincesses

items.text:
🎭 AUDITIONS – JACK ABSOLUTE FLIES AGAIN 🎭

Join us on Wednesday 18 June at 7:00pm at the Harlequin Theatre for auditions for Jack Absolute Flies Again.

Set during the Battle of Britain in 1940, this fast-paced comedy follows RAF pilot Jack Absolute as he returns home determined to win back the heart of his former love, Lydia Languish. Inspired by Sheridan's classic comedy The Rivals, the play is packed with mistaken identities, romantic misunderstandings, larger-than-life characters and plenty of laugh-out-loud moments.

With its blend of wartime spirit, romance and farce, Jack Absolute Flies Again offers a wide range of exciting roles and a fantastic opportunity for performers of all experience levels.

Check out our audition's page on our website: www.harlequinplayers.com/auditions

📅 Auditions: Wednesday 18 June

🕖 Time: 7:00pm

📍 Venue: Harlequin Theatre

We look forward to seeing you there!

items.text:
🦖✨ THE ROARSOME DINO ADVENTURE IS COMING! ✨🦖

Step back in time for a Jurassic day of roar-some fun at The Grand! Join our friendly dinosaur palaeontologists and explore a prehistoric world packed with adventure, discovery, and dino magic!

Get creative with Dino mask making, dig for ancient treasures in the Dino fossil dig, and train to become a top explorer in Roar ranger training! Then enjoy the thrilling Dino show before dancing the day away at the Dino disco 🪩🦖

Meet our giant prehistoric friends up close in the magical Dinos meet and greet, and don’t forget to capture the moment at our photo opportunity!

📅 Sunday 12th July
📍 The Grand
💷 £10 per person

⏰ Session Times:
11:00am – 1:30pm
3:00pm – 5:30pm

A roar-some family adventure you won’t want to miss! 🌿🦖✨

items.summary:
🦖✨ THE ROARSOME DINO ADVENTURE IS COMING! ✨🦖

Step back in time for a Jurassic day of roar-some fun at The Grand! Join our friendly dinosaur palaeontologists and explore a prehistoric world packed with adventure, discovery, and dino magic!

Get creative with Dino mask making, dig for ancient treasures in the Dino fossil dig, and train to become a top explorer in Roar ranger training! Then enjoy the thrilling Dino show before dancing the day away at the Dino disco 🪩🦖

Meet our giant prehistoric friends up close in the magical Dinos meet and greet, and don’t forget to capture the moment at our photo opportunity!

📅 Sunday 12th July
📍 The Grand
💷 £10 per person

⏰ Session Times:
11:00am – 1:30pm
3:00pm – 5:30pm

A roar-some family adventure you won’t want to miss! 🌿🦖✨
items.title: 🦖✨ THE ROARSOME DINO ADVENTURE IS COMING! ✨🦖

items.text:
Zostały jeszcze dwie role do obsadzenia:

1. Eliza około 33 lat.
Jest to główna rola także proszę osoby z dużym doświadczeniem na planie.
Terminy zdjęć 21,22,23 czerwca.

2. Mateusz około 32 lat.
Epizodyczna rola na 21 oraz 23 czerwca. 
Odnośnie Mateusza proszę tylko osoby z Wrocławia i okolic.

Zdjęcia odbędą się we Wrocławiu.
Produkcja Trudne Sprawy. 
Wynagrodzenie za rolę jak i zwrot kosztów podróży płatne gotówką na planie. Hotel na koszt firmy. 

Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na emial adres 
adrian.zarzecki@polotmedia.pl z informacją wiek, jakie doświadczenie na planie, aktualne zdjęcia i numer tel.

Można też napisać komentarz pod postem.
Postaram odezwać się do każdego kandydata.

Do zobaczenia na planie ;)

items.text:
# **[KRAKÓW] CASTING NA PROWADZĄCEGO / WSPÓŁTWÓRCĘ PODCASTU WIDEO**

Szukam charyzmatycznego prowadzącego do autorskiego podcastu w Krakowie. Ty dostarczasz wizerunek, wiedzę i pomysł, ja zapewniam pełne zaplecze produkcyjne. Szukam partnera, a nie klienta do wynajęcia studia.

Jesteś aktorem/aktorką, świetnie czujesz się przed kamerą i masz nienaganną dykcję, ale oprócz tego masz unikalną wiedzę, pasję (niekoniecznie związaną z aktorstwem!) i znasz swoją niszę od podszewki? Świetnie. Ja dysponuję w Krakowie w pełni wyposażonym, profesjonalnym studiem wideo (wielokamerowy system na pełnoklatkowych aparatach Lumix, miksery ATEM, profesjonalne oświetlenie) oraz twardym technicznym know-how.

Połączmy te dwa kapitały. Stwórzmy format oparty na idealnej synergii i bezkompromisowej jakości.

**Jak wygląda nasz podział ról?**
* **Twoja działka (Wizerunek, Charyzma i Merytoryka):** Jesteś twarzą, głosem i mózgiem operacyjnym w kwestii treści. Wykorzystujesz swój warsztat przed kamerą, ale wchodzisz do studia i skupiasz się wyłącznie na tym, w czym jesteś absolutnym ekspertem. Zapraszasz wartościowych gości, prowadzisz rozmowy, dzielisz się wiedzą i budujesz społeczność wokół formatu.
* **Moja działka (Technologia i Zaplecze):** Pełnię rolę Twojego technicznego wspólnika i producenta. Biorę na siebie 100% procesów realizacyjnych. Odpowiadam za wielokamerową realizację obrazu, zaawansowany montaż i profesjonalną obróbkę dźwięku (DaVinci Resolve). Wycinam z naszych nagrań dynamiczne formaty pionowe (TikTok, Reels, Shorts), optymalizuję je i ogarniam techniczną stronę dystrybucji.

**Model biznesowy (Zasady 50/50):** Gramy do jednej bramki. Nie płacisz mi z góry za wynajem studia ani za montaż. Budujemy wspólne przedsięwzięcie i dzielimy się zyskami z monetyzacji (przychody z YouTube, wsparcie od widzów przez Patronite, kontrakty sponsorskie, lokowania, a w przyszłości własne produkty) dokładnie po połowie. Dzielimy ryzyko i dzielimy sukces.

Zależy mi na osobie, która podchodzi do biznesu z pełnym profesjonalizmem, ma na siebie konkretny pomysł i potrafi konsekwentnie działać. Żeby sprawdzić nasze biznesowe dopasowanie i chemię przed kamerą, zrobimy na start 4-odcinkowy sezon pilotażowy (Proof of Concept). Zobaczymy, jak współpracuje nam się w praktyce.

**CZEGO WYMAGAM NA START (Przeczytaj uważnie):**

Jeśli widzisz w tym potencjał, wyślij mi wiadomość prywatną. Oczekuję jednak maksymalnego konkretu. Twoja aplikacja musi precyzyjnie i w szczegółach opisywać:
1. **Format i tematykę:** Jaki dokładnie podcast chcesz prowadzić i do kogo docelowo ma trafiać?
2. **Twarde kompetencje:** Dlaczego to właśnie Ty masz o tym mówić? Samo wykształcenie aktorskie to za mało – wymagam jasnego potwierdzenia ekspertyzy w wybranym temacie (poparte dowodami: doświadczenie zawodowe, zrealizowane projekty, konkretne zainteresowania).
3. **Bazę gości:** Czy masz własną sieć kontaktów, znajomych lub współpracowników z danej branży, których od razu będziesz w stanie zaprosić do udziału w projekcie w charakterze gości?

**Ważna uwaga na koniec:** Szanujmy swój czas. Jeśli Twoja wiadomość nie będzie precyzyjna i zabraknie w niej szczegółów dotyczących Twojego pomysłu, kompetencji oraz konkretnego zakresu działania – nie odpiszę.

Czekam na profesjonalne propozycje na priv.

items.text:
NOWY PROGRAM KULINARNY ZGŁOŚ SIĘ JUŻ DZIŚ!
Lubisz gotować? Gotowanie to Twoja pasja?

Szukamy uczestników do nowego programu kulinarnego. Mile widziane są osoby, które po raz pierwszy chcą spróbować swoich sił przed kamerami.

Jeśli gotowanie sprawia Ci przyjemność, czekamy właśnie na Ciebie. 

Na uczestników czekają nagrody!

Napisz do mnie w wiadomości prywatnej, a opowiem o szczegółach.

Zuza

items.text:
Die Aufmerksamkeitsspanne und das Unterhaltungniveau haben sich in den letzten 20 Jahren drastisch verändert.
Dies bedeutet für uns Trainer, dass unsere Methoden sich weiter entwickeln müssen, in Bezug auf Training mit Jugendlichen.
Da ich seit über 25 Jahren Kampfsport unterrichte, konnte ich dies sehr gut mit erleben.
Ich finde es gibt ein Zitat, was das Ganze sehr gut schildert: „entweder gehst du mit der Zeit oder du gehst mit der Zeit“.
Während des Trainings läuft bei mir grundsätzlich keine Musik, damit die Kids sich auf das Training vollständig konzentrieren.
Jedoch wenn wir unsere Langstreckenläufer machen, nehme ich ab und zu - nicht immer - meine Lautsprecher mit um den Kids ein Gefühl von Party machen, im gesunden Rahmen zu vermitteln.
Junge Menschen sehnen sich nach Aufmerksamkeit und hierfür machen sie mittlerweile die skurrilsten Sachen, um diese Aufmerksamkeit zu erlangen.
Aus pädagogischer Sicht ist es sehr wertvoll, während einer hoch konzentrierten Tätigkeit nebenbei Musik laufen zu lassen.
In unserem Fall sind die Kinder gestern mit den Eltern zusammen 6 km vor dem Training gelaufen und ich ließ einige meiner Lieblingslieder laufen 😉 (Wortspiel)
Etwas melodisches, nicht zu aggressiv, einfach ein positiver Sommervibe, der die Trainingsintensität unterstreicht.
Hierbei geht es drum ein Statement zu setzen, dass junge Menschen cool sind, wenn sie etwas für ihre Gesundheit tun und dies auch noch vor den Augen der ganzen Stadt.
Und genauso funktioniert es.
Es gibt viele perspektivlose Jugendliche, die auf Parkbänke ihre kostbare Zeit vergeuden und nicht wissen, was sie mit sich anfangen sollen.
Und dann gibt es uns; Menschen, die damit auffallen, etwas was eigentlich das Selbstverständlichste auf der Welt sein sollte.
Anstatt negative Schlagzeilen aus den Nachrichten zu rezitieren und sich seine Welt dunkler auszumalen als sie ist.
Vermitteln wir eine Botschaft von konstruktiv kollektivem Handeln.

Don‘t talk the talk, run the run 🎵 

#sensaisam #sensai_sam #sensailino #sensaisamontour #teamsensaisam

items.groupTitle: Film- und Musikschaffende, Schauspieler, Musiker, Darsteller, Sänger, Model
items.summary:
Die Aufmerksamkeitsspanne und das Unterhaltungniveau haben sich in den letzten 20 Jahren drastisch verändert.
Dies bedeutet für uns Trainer, dass unsere Methoden sich weiter entwickeln müssen, in Bezug auf Training mit Jugendlichen.
Da ich seit über 25 Jahren Kampfsport unterrichte, konnte ich dies sehr gut mit erleben.
Ich finde es gibt ein Zitat, was das Ganze sehr gut schildert: „entweder gehst du mit der Zeit oder du gehst mit der Zeit“.
Während des Trainings läuft bei mir grundsätzlich keine Musik, damit die Kids sich auf das Training vollständig konzentrieren.
Jedoch wenn wir unsere Langstreckenläufer machen, nehme ich ab und zu - nicht immer - meine Lautsprecher mit um den Kids ein Gefühl von Party machen, im gesunden Rahmen zu vermitteln.
Junge Menschen sehnen sich nach Aufmerksamkeit und hierfür machen sie mittlerweile die skurrilsten Sachen, um diese Aufmerksamkeit zu erlangen.
Aus pädagogischer Sicht ist es sehr wertvoll, während einer hoch konzentrierten Tätigkeit nebenbei Musik laufen zu lassen.
In unserem Fall sind die Kinder gestern mit den Eltern zusammen 6 km vor dem Training gelaufen und ich ließ einige meiner Lieblingslieder laufen 😉 (Wortspiel)
Etwas melodisches, nicht zu aggressiv, einfach ein positiver Sommervibe, der die Trainingsintensität unterstreicht.
Hierbei geht es drum ein Statement zu setzen, dass junge Menschen cool sind, wenn sie etwas für ihre Gesundheit tun und dies auch noch vor den Augen der ganzen Stadt.
Und genauso funktioniert es.
Es gibt viele perspektivlose Jugendliche, die auf Parkbänke ihre kostbare Zeit vergeuden und nicht wissen, was sie mit sich anfangen sollen.
Und dann gibt es uns; Menschen, die damit auffallen, etwas was eigentlich das Selbstverständlichste auf der Welt sein sollte.
Anstatt negative Schlagzeilen aus den Nachrichten zu rezitieren und sich seine Welt dunkler auszumalen als sie ist.
Vermitteln wir eine Botschaft von konstruktiv kollektivem Handeln.

Don‘t talk the talk, run the run 🎵 

#sensaisam #sensai_sam #sensailino #sensaisamontour #teamsensaisam

items.text:
🌹✨ Meine neue Homepage ist online! ✨🌹

Mit großer Freude möchte ich euch meine neue Webseite vorstellen:

🌐 https://sabrina-kreativprojekte.beepworld.de/

Auf dieser Seite nehme ich euch mit auf meine kreative Reise als Autorin und Projektentwicklerin.

📖 Geschichten und Buchprojekte
🎭 Theater, Bühne und Kreativität
🎵 Musik- und Songprojekte
✨ IMPÉRIA – LUMIÈRE ÉTERNELLE
💡 Visionen und Herzensprojekte

🚧 Die Webseite befindet sich aktuell noch im Aufbau und wird von mir nahezu täglich erweitert und weiterentwickelt.

📝 Besonders würde ich mich freuen, wenn ihr mir einen Eintrag in meinem Gästebuch hinterlasst. Jeder Gruß, jedes Feedback und jeder Gedanke bedeuten mir sehr viel und helfen mir, meinen kreativen Weg weiterzugehen.

Vielen Dank für euren Besuch und eure Unterstützung. ❤️

🌹 Sabrina van der Felden
Autorin & Kreativprojekte

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of ‎text that says '‎Sabrina van der ه Felden Autorin & Kreativprojekte Willkommen auf meiner kreativen Welt Welt Herzlich willkommen Mein Name ist Sabrina van der Felden.‎'‎

May be an image of text that says 'Herzlich willkommen Mein Name ist Sabrina van der Felden. Ich bin Autorin und entwickle kreative Projekte rund um Geschichten, Musik, Bühnenkunst und Storytelling. Diese Webseite gibt Einblicke in meine kreativen Arbeiten, meine Visionen und die Welt von IMPÉRIA- LUMIÈRE ÉTERNELLE. Kreativität bedeutet für mich, Ideen lebendig werden zu lassen, Menschen zu berühren und neue Welten zu erschaffen. Ich freue mich, Sie auf meiner kreativen Reise begrüßen zu dürfen. Herzlichst Sabrina van der Felden Autorin & Kreativprojekte'

items.text:
CASTING CALL for feature film, “Astrogenesis” (astrogenesis.one).

No phone calls, DMs, texts. Emails to info@astrogenesis.one only. Must work local in Greensboro, NC USA

Astrogenesis (originally Nemesis Eterna) is a SAG Micro-budget (sub $20K) feature film from Srace Films,

ESP CoPro & Lunar Kitchen Films and originally began during the pandemic in North Carolina, USA but halted when filmmaker Victoria Srace Stone was disabled with Complex Regional Pain Syndrome.

Project is trans positive with female/gender-diverse/queer/diverse cast and crew. Gross profit sharing for all cast and crew. All lead and principal roles are paid. Director is disabled so shooting days will be 8 hours or less with frequent days off.

LOGLINE: A rebellious trans punk rocker mysteriously linked to a constellation of misfits and lost souls must partner with a hardened documentary journalist to uncover humanity’s alien origins before a shadowy renegade government agent’s machinations destroy Earth.

No nudity or sex, but some mature content). Certified Intimacy Coordinator on the production available.

Man of Shadows, 40-60: (lead antagonist)

Paid. Nondescript white male, long monologues, simple safe stunts, comfortable with physical prosthesis (no makeup or mask).

Raquel Villareal, 40-60: (supporting lead)

Paid. Nightclub manager, first generation Mexican immigrant, matter of fact, practical, concrete. Secretly religious (Catholic) but outwardly works in shady business. Bilingual desired.

London, 35-60: (supporting)

Paid via gross profit sharing. Bartender, (any race/gender), loquacious, Master’s in English, prone to long stories, the opposite of a good listener but heart of gold.

Reese, 35-60: (supporting)

Paid via gross profit sharing .Cook at Bev’s (any race/gender), tough as nails, jumped from job to job all over the world due to a rebellious, f**k it attitude, always looking for fight.

Jax, 25-50: (supporting)

Paid via gross profit sharing. Punk rock band bassist, trans (male, non-binary, female or other), deep introvert but a musical snob, thinks Jett is an idiot but too introverted to get into other bands. Slow to anger but holds on grudges long.

Xris 25-50: (supporting)

Paid via gross profit sharing. Pronounced Chris, punk rock drummer, trans (male, non-binary, female or other), party animal, always in trouble, always late, but fantastic drummer, bounced out of every band in town.

items.text:
**NOW CASTING — New York City & Surrounding**

**Have you recently forgiven someone who broke your trust? Are you in the process of healing and rebuilding a relationship? Do you have a powerful story of hardship, redemption, or reconciliation with a son, daughter, spouse, parent, friend, or partner?**

**We want to hear from you. **

**We are casting real people with real stories for a short form digital series rooted in compassion, healing, and emotional connection. If your story moved you, it will move others.**

**1-2 hour (in person) commitment in the city. Must be able to self report! Exact date/location is TBD, estimated late June or early July shoot date. Compensation: $150 Flat Rate + complimentary product. For more details please email: jess.w.casting@gmail.com**

items.text:
Hello! My name is Waleska Duno, I'm the producer of "The Starting Line" a capstone project and student short film written by Tyasia Poole in association with Valencia College, Orlando Fl.

We are currently focused on finding CHRIS our male lead, but still accepting tapes for the other characters!

This is non-paid and non-union. Food will be provided.

Self-tapes are acceptable until June 16th! 

The Filming will take place July 11-13th in the Orlando area, please email me if you have any questions! 

Sides will be provided via email. 

Stay Groovy, 

Waleska Duno

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text

topComments.text: Do you need a child labor coordinator, talent coordinator or studio teacher? I am all three and live in Atlanta, but have a place in Orlando should you need the help. Have worked on 5 scad student films to help out so let me know! Good luck

items.groupTitle: PRACA w produkcji filmowej - Statyści, Aktorzy, Epizodyści, TFP, NON-PROFIT

items.text:
Każdy moment ma znaczenie! Twój jest właśnie teraz! Mamy casting do reklamy znanej sieci sklepów spożywczych!

! MOŻLIWA DŁUŻSZA WSPÓŁPRACA !

Do reklamy sieci znanych sklepów spożywczych poszukujemy:

(osoby sprawne aktorsko z zacięciem komediowym)

ANIA (20–25 lat)
Naturalna dziewczyna z sąsiedztwa, typowa przedstawicielka pokolenia Z. Swobodna, autentyczna, bez przesadnej stylizacji. Naturalne włosy, wygodne ubrania – szerokie jeansy, oversize'owe bluzy, sneakersy.
Ciekawa świata, zawsze na bieżąco z trendami i nowościami. Chętnie testuje nowe produkty i limitowane edycje. Energiczna, konkretna, bezpośrednia i bardzo sympatyczna.

PIOTREK (22–26 lat)
Zwyczajny chłopak o luźnym, niewymuszonym stylu. T-shirt lub longsleeve, rozpinana bluza, szerokie jeansy lub sztruksy, klasyczne trampki.
Wyluzowany, inteligentny i technologicznie ogarnięty. Lubi aplikacje, promocje, memy i internetowy humor. Ma naturalne poczucie humoru, jest spokojny, lojalny i stanowi świetny balans dla bardziej energicznej Ani.

STAWKA:
od 6 000 zł !

MATERIAŁY DO NAGRANIA:
DLA WSZYSTKICH: WIZYTÓWKA + SCENKA

TIMING:
18.06 czwartek godz 12.00 termin nadsyłania zgłoszeń na maila

22.06.2026 poniedziałek RECALL

30.06 i/lub 01.07 zdjęcia w Warszawie

ZGŁOSZENIA:

Zgłoszenie mailowe zawierające imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + zdjęcie + link do video wizytówki + nagranie sceny proszę przesłać na: casting@unagimedia.pl

Tytuł: 075

Link do castingu + sceny + szerszy opis postaci:
https://unagimedia.pl/pl/casting075/

To jak? Gotowy na swoje 5 minut? Czekamy na Twoje zgłoszenie!

items.text:
**Are you looking for a different kind of acting class?**

Want to take your acting career to the next level?

Want to work with an acting tutor with over 20 years experience in the industry who has worked with some of the biggest directors in the UK? 

Well, Scene 2 Screen is where you need to be! 

We work hard week in week out to deliver screen acting classes that focus on practical learning with a huge emphasis on getting you in front of a camera, and best of all you get 2 showreel style scenes to keep and use how you want each month! 

For the low price of just £85 a month… what are you waiting for? 

Email: [Scene2ScreenMCR@gmail.com](mailto:Scene2ScreenMCR@gmail.com) to book!

items.text:
**OPEN CASTING CALL -  LOS ANGELES**

**SAG & Non-Union Feature Film.**

**We are making a film about the people who show up for others.**

**SEEKING: **

**African American Male & Female. 18 to 60**

**Asian Male.  32 to 45**

**Latino Male. 18 to 30 White **

**Male & Female. 40 to 60**

**Los Angeles locals only. **

**Filming July 13 – August 28. SAG $810 / 8hrs — Non-Union $200 / 10hrs**

**Submit now at ****[now@civlzn.com](mailto:now@civlzn.com)**** **

[https://www.instagram.com/civlzn/](https://www.instagram.com/civlzn/)

**Subject line: DECISION**

**Include:  Name -  Phone number - City / neighborhood - Photo — phone camera fine, no filters, no sunglasses, no hats -Union if any**

**Roles filling now.**

items.text:
Poszukuje Mamy z synkiem w wieku od około 3 do 4 lat do sesji video produktu dla dzieci, dla polskiej marki Rabbit & Friends

Sesja (krótkie video -do online- promujące nowy produkt) w dniu 26 czerwca (piątek) lub 27 czerwca (sobota) - dzień do ustalenia, w Warszawie - Targówek. Umowa na wizerunek zarówno dziecka jak i Mamy bezterminowo i bez ograniczeń terytorialnych. 
Płatność 500zł
Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na sylwia@rabbitandfriends.eu do 21czerwca. 
Zgłoszenie powinno zawierać numer telefonu, Twoje imię i nazwisko, imię, wiek i rozmiar ubranka dziecka oraz aktualne zdjęcia buzi i sylwetek.
Na sesje trzeba przeznaczyć ok 3-4godz, w zależności jak sprawnie pójdzie współpraca z kamerzystą 🙂 Jeśli dziecko będzie potrzebować czasu, czy przerwy jesteśmy elastyczne. Byłoby lepiej, gdyby dziecko czuło się swobodnie przed kamerą i było uśmiechnięte, nie wystraszone kamery.

Szukam też dzieci w wieku 3-5, zarówno chłopiec jak i dziewczynka, do drugiej sesji: foto, do tego samego produktu. Już bez Mamy 🙂

Na zdjęciu super Lampka silikonowa Miś Duży z Głośnikiem i Pilotem 🙂 

W razie pytań, proszę pisać na maila.

attachments.ocrText: No photo description available.

items.text:
Most artists only see the finished performance.

This is your chance to step inside the process.

Join now a unique opportunity: a three day residency focused on creating immersive, participatory, and atmospheric performance. Designed for artists who feel there is more to unlock in their practice, this residency offers hands on exploration of space, audience interaction, narrative, and performance making to craft intimate and transformative encounters.

Through guided tasks, improvisation, movement, and sensory investigation, you will explore how bodies, objects, text, and environments generate meaning through interaction. The work centres on presence, participation, and refining how audiences become active contributors within a performance experience. 

Perfect for theatre students, performers, directors and theatre makers looking to deepen their understanding of immersive performance and contribute to the development of a new immersive work.

Wants to read more about it:

https://viniciussalles.co.uk/?p=2905

THE POETICS OF SPACE

3 DAY RESIDENCY

📍 Colab Tower, London

📅 22, 23 & 24 June

⚠️ Places are limited

🔗 Bookings here:

https://viniciussalles.co.uk/?p=2852

A moment to go further.

Explore the intersection of body, space, participation, and the other.

.

.

.

#ImmersiveTheatre #physicaltheatre #ActorTraining #DanceTraining #ArtistDevelopment #ContemporaryPerformance #Punchdrunk #GeckoTheatre #JasminVardimon #LondonTheatre #UKTheatre #ArtsCouncilEngland

items.text:
🎭 HELLO ACTORS! 🎭

I'll be attending the Actors & Filmmakers Networking Event at HOME, Manchester, on 28th June (2:00pm–6:30pm), where I'll be connecting with actors and sharing information about my Catbirding behavioural characterisation methodology and coaching services.

If you're interested in developing deeper character understanding and performance skills, it would be great to meet you there.

My book is due for release at the end of the month, with free workshops launching in July. Feel free to follow me for updates, workshop dates, and training opportunities.

Find out more at:
www.catbirding.com

Tickets available via Eventbrite:
https://www.eventbrite.co.uk/e/actors-and-filmmakers-networking-event-tickets-1983730891497?utm_id=97758_v0_s00_e0_tv2_a1den5evana2l0&fbclid=IwY2xjawSeJ4NleHRuA2FlbQIxMABzcnRjBmFwcF9pZBAyMjIwMzkxNzg4MjAwODkyAAEet3js64JVJfMf_pZJ9rEIsWcKTxqSXvpLd3Yis3Dc_gfXCk8AnkTrT2GsnmE_aem_Vdbf-_liRKQ6QF8yo8ByEg

Hope to see you there! 😊

items.text:
FEATURE FILM – ASHES

Atlanta, GA | Non-Union | Paid
Rate: Starting at $300/day (negotiable for the right fit)
Shoot Window: Fall 2026

Casting Update:
Most principal and supporting roles have been cast. We are reopening submissions for the LEAD role of CAMILLE REYES.

LOGLINE

When a sharp Atlanta attorney is assigned to represent the estranged husband of her closest friend, buried history, desire, and betrayal force three people to choose what they’re willing to lose when loyalty turns to ash.

CAMILLE REYES (LEAD)

Woman, 30s
All ethnicities encouraged to submit.

A highly controlled Atlanta attorney whose carefully ordered life begins to unravel when unresolved feelings resurface during her best friend’s divorce case.

Camille carries the majority of the film and requires an actor capable of emotional restraint, intelligence, vulnerability, and strong screen presence. We’re looking for someone who can communicate internal conflict through behavior, silence, and subtle shifts rather than speeches.

Please submit:
• Headshot
• Resume (if available)
• Demo reel or self-tape
• Contact information

Subject Line:
ASHES – CAMILLE SUBMISSION

Send to:
S.johnsonstudiosatl@gmail.com

items.groupTitle: Casting For Artists&Dancers Travel All Over The World
items.title: (no title)

items.text:
Bonjour,

Je suis à la recherche d’un danseur en urgence pour une date de spectacle dans un palace en suisse la dernière semaine de juin.  

Du 23 au 28 juin ( 23 24 repetition, 25 direction la suisse spectacle le 27 et retour le 28)

5 chorégraphies a apprendre . chacha jive rock boogie charleston

Tout les transports et logement sont prix en charge. Nous logerons sur place au palace en suisse au lieu de la representation.
Possibilité payé en cachet spectacle 

Merci 
Plus dinfos en dm
Quentin

items.previewTitle:
If you're interested, email us (see bio) with your CV and headshots!

Before It’s All Over is a new original comedy drama centring on four friends who, facing a number of issues ranging from dissertation deadlines, pushy parents, identity and self-destructive behaviour, learn that a meteorite is set to hit the Earth. Deciding to go out with a figurative bang before the literal one, they decide to finish out their lives with a final party.

items.text:
Koniec czerwca – początek lipca (dokładne daty do ustalenia)
🎬🎥✅🤩Do epizodu w serialu poszukuję chłopca w wieku 5-6 lat (może być starszy, ale niskiego wzrostu).

Wymagana dobra znajomość języka angielskiego – rola z kwestiami mówionymi.

 Stawka: 1000 zł brutto za dzień zdjęciowy 💗

 Dni zdjęciowe: 2 dni

Zgłoszenia prosimy przesyłać na adres e-mail - tatianamakhdi@gmail.com 

Wiadomość powinna zawierać:

 Imię i nazwisko dziecka

 Wiek oraz wzrost

 Numer telefonu do opiekuna

 Aktualne zdjęcia

 Obowiązkowo: wizytówkę wideo (self-tape) w języku angielskim (koniecznie)

items.text: Hej! Jestem zainteresowana grą w filmach i chętnie spróbuję swoich sił jako aktorka. Mam 14 lat i nigdy wcześniej nie grałam w żadnym filmie, ale to moje marzenie i bardzo chciałabym zdobyć pierwsze doświadczenie. Jeśli ktoś szuka kogoś początkującego, to chętnie podeślę więcej informacji 🙂

items.groupTitle: PRACA w produkcji filmowej - Statyści, Aktorzy, Epizodyści, TFP, NON-PROFIT

items.text:
Do kolejnych odcinków serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn do następujących ról:

1. Mężczyzna 1 (27) – kryminalista. Dobrze zbudowany. 
Data: 03. lipca
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

2. Beniek (28) – Gangus poszukiwany listem gończym. Typ ryzykanta, który najpierw działa, potem myśli. KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY !!!
Data: 02. lipca
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

3. Dawid Górecki (35) – złodziej samochodów. W dobrej formie, opanowany, rozsądny.  KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY !!!
Data: 02. lipca
Stawka: 600 zł netto 

4. Dawid Kowara (37) – bandyta średniego szczebla, trochę mniej bystry. Silny, przypakowany. Lubi przestępcze życie, zawsze chętny do działania więc ma sporo za uszami, ale poza odsiedzianym wyrokiem 3 lata za wymuszenie nic mu nie udowodniono.  
Data: 29. i 30. czerwca
Stawka: 1400 zł za całość 

5. Albert Moński (39) – bandyta średniego szczebla, dość przenikliwy, zdecydowany w działaniu. Sprawny fizycznie ale nie kafar. W przeszłości dostał 5 lat za rozbój. W więzieniu bardzo się wycwanił, dlatego po wyjściu nic mu już nigdy nie udowodniono. Energiczny w zachowaniu (pada w tekście). KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY !!!
Data: 29. i 30. czerwca
Stawka: 1400 zł za całość 

6. Mężczyzna 2 (40) – sprawny fizycznie.
Data: 03. lipca
Stawka: 300 zł netto 

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę materiał ze scenariusza do nagrania)
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.title: Do kolejnych odcinków serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn do następujących ról:

items.text:
Do nowego odcinka GLINIARZY realizowanego w Warszawie oraz bliskich okolicach szukam:

- Julian Roztocki z psem ( UWAGA: SZUKAMY PANA, KTÓRY WYSTĄPI ZE SWOIM PSEM)(52) – Samotny mężczyzna z psem, mieszkający na wsi. Dobre serce, ale potrafi też być stanowczy.
DATA: 2.07
STAWKA: 700 zł netto

- Roman Roztocki (47) – Typ biznesmena, kombinuje, jak tu rozkręcić nowy biznes. 
DATA: 2.07 i 3.07
STAWKA: 1000 ZŁ NETTO

- Marcin Skiba (46) – Samotny mężczyzna. Wściekły, że w życiu mu nie wyszło i wyżywa się na innych. 
DATA: 1.07 i 2.07
STAWKA: 1200 ZŁ NETTO

- Pani Jadzia (60) - Starsza, poczciwa Pani ze wsi, której oczom nic nie umknie. 
DATA: 2.07
STAWKA: 300 ZŁ NETTO

- Iwona Roztocka (45) – Żona, która zamierza rozwieść się z Romanem. Jest poirytowana jego długami. 
DATA: 1.07
STAWKA: 400 ZŁ NETTO

- Piotr Szewczyk (31) – Wyszedł z więzienia, specjalizuje się w okradaniu domów. 
DATA: 2.07
STAWKA: 400 ZŁ NETTO

- Paweł Szewczyk (29) –  Drugi z braci przestępców, mieszkających w przyczepie. Ten mniej narwany.
DATA: 2.07
STAWKA: 400 ZŁ NETTO

- Ada Pajor (25-35) –  Wolontaryjnie działa w TOZie, jest ambitna. Pomaga policji, bardzo jej zależy na zwierzętach. 
DATA: 1.07
STAWKA: 600 ZŁ NETTO

- Michalina (38) – Pracuje w TOZie w administracji
DATA: 1.07
STAWKA: 400 ZŁ NETTO

- Pracownik (43) – pracownik fizyczny w zakładzie metalurgicznym. 
DATA: 2.07
STAWKA: 300 ZŁ NETTO

- Bąk (40) – Właściciel psa, który wścieka się podczas interwencji TOZu. 
DATA: 1.07
STAWKA: 400 ZŁ NETTO

- Lokalny Mundurowy (43) – Pomaga detektywom, poczciwy 
DATA: 2.07
STAWKA: 400 ZŁ NETTO

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o zgłoszenia na adres: outsetola@op.pl

W tytule e-maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.
W treści:
- Wiek, wzrost, waga
- Numer telefonu
- Informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu przed kamerą
- Linki do swoich materiałów video: wizytówka/demo/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę do nagrania scenę ze scenariusza)
- Aktualne zdjęcie
- Informacja czy grali Państwo w przeszłości w Gliniarzach lub Gliniarzach Śląsk

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

STAWKA: 400 ZŁ NETTO

- Paweł Szewczyk (29) –  Drugi z braci przestępców, mieszkających w przyczepie. Ten mniej narwany.
DATA: 2.07
STAWKA: 400 ZŁ NETTO

- Ada Pajor (25-35) –  Wolontaryjnie działa w TOZie, jest ambitna. Pomaga policji, bardzo jej zależy na zwierzętach. 
DATA: 1.07
STAWKA: 600 ZŁ NETTO

- Michalina (38) – Pracuje w TOZie w administracji
DATA: 1.07
STAWKA: 400 ZŁ NETTO

- Pracownik (43) – pracownik fizyczny w zakładzie metalurgicznym. 
DATA: 2.07
STAWKA: 300 ZŁ NETTO

- Bąk (40) – Właściciel psa, który wścieka się podczas interwencji TOZu. 
DATA: 1.07
STAWKA: 400 ZŁ NETTO

- Lokalny Mundurowy (43) – Pomaga detektywom, poczciwy 
DATA: 2.07
STAWKA: 400 ZŁ NETTO

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o zgłoszenia na adres: outsetola@op.pl

W tytule e-maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.
W treści:
- Wiek, wzrost, waga
- Numer telefonu
- Informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu przed kamerą
- Linki do swoich materiałów video: wizytówka/demo/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę do nagrania scenę ze scenariusza)
- Aktualne zdjęcie
- Informacja czy grali Państwo w przeszłości w Gliniarzach lub Gliniarzach Śląsk

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

🚨 SEEKING PRODUCTION COMPANY / PRODUCING PARTNER FOR FEATURE FILM 🚨

I’m looking to connect with a serious production company, producer, or investor-aligned film team for my completed feature screenplay, **FIRST CONTACT**.

**Logline:**
A Connecticut construction foreman begins witnessing unexplained aerial phenomena no one else can see—until he becomes the unlikely bridge to humanity’s first peaceful contact with an extraterrestrial intelligence.

This is a **character-driven sci-fi feature** with:
🎬 completed screenplay
📘 pitch deck
📄 one-sheet / project snapshot
✨ franchise potential

Early Actor Attachments: 

Jeffrey Alan Solomon 

Emery Smith Gaia Television Host of "Cosmic Disclosure"

I’m Connecticut-based and looking for the right producing path for this project. If you are a producer, production company, or industry professional aligned with original independent features, I’d love to connect.

Please EMAIL me directly if interested or if you know someone I should reach out to. Please title subject line: FIRST CONTACT

Thank you 🙏
**Glenn E. Mate Sr.**

**Email: glennmatesr@gmail.com**

items.text:
Casting Call: Athletic Female Model/Actress (18–30)
Location: Ontario, CA (or relatively close)

Shoot Date: June 18, 19 or 20th 

Compensation: $100 for 3-4 hours of work, plus any meals/snacks -- not negotiable

I am reshooting a project and I have an immediate need to cast a physically fit or athletic female model/actress (18–30) for an educational video project that will be shown to junior/community college students at a school in Southern California. This short-form documentary aims to explore the real-life accessibility and lifestyle challenges faced during a temporary injury requiring the use of crutches and a fiberglass splint and/or cast on the leg.

About the Role:

You’ll portray an individual recovering from a temporary lower-limb injury, navigating public spaces and day-to-day activities. Scenes may include attempting to use stairs, accessing public buildings, malls, shopping, navigating campus hallways, and more—while using crutches and a medical-grade cast/splint (provided). The shoot will be filmed in one day in 3-4 hours, but crafted to look like multiple days.

Ideal Candidate:

• Female, 18–30 years old

• Athletic, active, or fitness-oriented (to contrast with sudden mobility loss)

• Based in the greater Los Angeles area 

• Comfortable with physical activity on crutches

• Natural presence on camera; able to convey authentic emotion

• Will be required to bring different outfits shoes, and a few different items (backpack, etc), but the cast/splint and crutches are provided.

• Prior modeling or acting experience is a plus, but not required

• Prior injury experience, experience with crutches and/or a cast is also a plus, but not required

Project Highlights:

• Educational, socially conscious content

• Documentary-style, mostly improvised lines, with some lines and general content provided

• Produced for classroom use to foster empathy and accessibility awareness

• Safe, supportive environment with clear direction and assistance

• Ability to get creative and add to this project based on your past experience and experience during the shoot

To Apply:

Please send me a direct message, respond in the comments or  email Brettsmithh316@gmail.com the following information:

• Full name and age

• Headshot and full-body photo

• Short intro (ideally a video) about yourself and why you’re interested, including previous acting/modeling experience, athletic experience, and cast/crutches experience (if any!)

• Relevant experience (performance, sports, with injury or cast/crutches etc.)

• General availability this this Thursday, Friday or Saturday 

Note: All equipment (crutches, splint/cast) will be provided. The cast is non-permanent and purely for demonstration and will be applied/removed safely.

items.text:
**Greetings to my fellow filmmakers. I have written a screenplay entitled, ‘Bambi Angelina’ about a massive problem facing tens-of-thousands of young girls caught up in the underage sex trade told through the eyes of a 14-year-old girl – a child piano prodigy -- forced into prostitution by her mother in Jaco Beach, Costa Rica. It’s a similar story as the Sound of Freedom which recently grossed more than $250-million at the box office. ‘Bambi Angelina’ will also be a Box Office Thriller.**

**Isn’t this what you all are looking for? A great true story with guts that tells the truth about this subject that many never want to discuss. In case after case, sexual abuse starts in the family.**

**‘Bambi Angelina’ is right in there with other stories like the ‘Epstein Files’ which has been worldwide headline news lately.**

**I have been trying to finance ‘Bambi Angelina’ for 8-years, long before the Sound of Freedom film was released in 2023. The budget for this film is about $4-million to be filmed on-location in exotic, tropical Jaco Beach. Straight up filmmaking with no special effects, no AI and no guns. Many of Jaco’s real-life prostitutes want to be in this film because they know this story is true because it’s their story as well.**

**The are two elements to this screenplay which have never been done in the history of filmmaking and that’s not easy to say.**

**I am a retired, multi-award-winning photo-journalist, reporter and news editor with the New York Times Company living on the beach in Esterillos Oeste, Costa Rica – not far from Jaco Beach on the Central Pacific Coast – where ‘Bambi Angelina’ took place.**

**Back in the mid-1970s, I worked on a 16mm Aeroflex camera crew for 4-years making films for school children for the Public Broadcasting System in Washington, DC and New York City. While in New York our crew lived at the infamous, old Chelsea Hotel – home to such greats as Dylan Thomas, Janis Joplin, Patty Smith and the Ramones. My B.A. Degree is in Mass Communications – TV, Radio, Film and print journalism from the University of Denver.**

**Who will star as ‘Bambi Angelina?’ For one, pianist Ladyva -- who is the world’s best Boogie-Woogie piano player. The teenage Bambi will be played by Charlotte Summers, of Marbella, Spain. She competed on America’s Got Talent when she was 13. Both Ladyva and Summers have read the book and the adapted screenplay. They want to do this. Both are social-media super stars with millions of followers around the world.**

**If you can help find the financing, you would receive a nice 5-figure bonus paid immediately after the funding becomes available.**

**Team Bambi is ready, willing and able to make a great film.**

**God’s children are not for sale.**

**To contact me, please use my email: ****[brittnelson777@yahoo.com](mailto:brittnelson777@yahoo.com)****.**

[https://www.amazon.com/Bambi-Angelina-Amazing-Success-Angelinas/dp/B0FNRVJJPN](https://www.amazon.com/Bambi-Angelina-Amazing-Success-Angelinas/dp/B0FNRVJJPN)
items.previewTitle: Bambi Angelina: Bambi's Amazing Success was Angelina's Revenge
items.previewDescription: Bambi Angelina concerns a child piano prodigy in Texas who is forced into the world of exploitation by her mother in Jaco Beach, Costa Rica in 1996. Her story is true, raw, troubling, and controversial. Bambi made millions on Hooker Highway, but what did it cost her? She was addicted to money and...

**To contact me, please use my email: ****[brittnelson777@yahoo.com](mailto:brittnelson777@yahoo.com)****.**

sharedPost.text:
🎭 SING? DANCE? DRAG PERFORM YO’ AZZZ OFF? 🎭

Then I need to see YOU!

Creation Temptation is casting NOW for our July Los Angeles launch Cafe Cabaret service and the exciting relaunch of 
Creation Temptation Events.

We're looking for talented Singers, Dancers, Drag Performers, Hosts, and Entertainers (18+) who are ready to bring charisma, creativity, and star power to the stage.

✨ Submit your audition reel today and let's create something Bold, Beautiful, and New together.

Not a performer? No problem!

Sign up to receive your invitation to join us this July at Robby's West Hollywood and get ready to...

🔥 #GETCABARETED REAL GOOD! 🔥

Because Nothing is Sexier Than Talent.™ — A. Cherry

Click link for Audition submissions:

https://www.creationtemptation2026.com/talent-casting

#CastingCall #PerformersWanted #Audition #PaidGig #LosAngelesTalent #DragArtists #DancersWanted #SingersWanted #CabaretLife #WestHollywood #CreationTemptation #GetCabareted #18Plus

items.text:
**TV & FILM ACTING SUMMER SCHOOLS – NOW BOOKING! 🎭**

Looking for a Summer School that offers more than just a week of fun? At Meladrama Acting School & Chaos Actors Management, young performers will spend their summer developing performance skills and industry knowledge whilst working alongside professionals who actively work in television, film and theatre.

Whether your child already attends performing arts classes, is represented by an agent, is preparing for drama school auditions, or simply loves performing, our Summer Schools are designed to challenge, inspire and develop young talent.

🎥 PLUS the opportunity to film professionally shot, Spotlight-suitable footage for showreels and profiles (no extra charge!)

Many young actors struggle to find strong, age-appropriate footage for Spotlight and casting submissions. Throughout the week, students will have opportunities to work on camera and create material suitable for use in professional portfolios.

Led by professional actor Melanie Ash and supported by Leo Ashton (currently filming Waterloo Road and known for House of the Dragon, The Bay and Deep Water), students will benefit from genuine industry experience alongside a fun, supportive and inclusive environment.

📍 PRESTON & CHORLEY
3rd–7th August 2026
Lostock Hall Conservative Club, Preston

📍 WARRINGTON
10th–14th August 2026
St Wilfrid's Parish Hall, Church Lane, Grappenhall, Warrington WA4 3EP

📍 WIGAN
28th–31st July 2026
Worsley Hall, Bramble House, 8 Broom Road, Wigan WN5 9QE

Suitable for ages 5–17.

Whether your child wants to pursue acting professionally or simply develop confidence and creativity, we'd love to welcome them this summer.

🎟 Places are limited.

Book here:
[[https://meladrama.co.uk/summer-schools/](https://meladrama.co.uk/summer-schools/)](https://meladrama.co.uk/summer-schools/)

items.text:
Każdy moment ma znaczenie! Twój jest właśnie teraz! Mamy casting do reklamy znanej sieci sklepów spożywczych!

! MOŻLIWA DŁUŻSZA WSPÓŁPRACA !

Do reklamy sieci znanych sklepów spożywczych poszukujemy:

(osoby sprawne aktorsko z zacięciem komediowym)

ANIA (20–25 lat)
Naturalna dziewczyna z sąsiedztwa, typowa przedstawicielka pokolenia Z. Swobodna, autentyczna, bez przesadnej stylizacji. Naturalne włosy, wygodne ubrania – szerokie jeansy, oversize'owe bluzy, sneakersy.
Ciekawa świata, zawsze na bieżąco z trendami i nowościami. Chętnie testuje nowe produkty i limitowane edycje. Energiczna, konkretna, bezpośrednia i bardzo sympatyczna.

PIOTREK (22–26 lat)
Zwyczajny chłopak o luźnym, niewymuszonym stylu. T-shirt lub longsleeve, rozpinana bluza, szerokie jeansy lub sztruksy, klasyczne trampki.
Wyluzowany, inteligentny i technologicznie ogarnięty. Lubi aplikacje, promocje, memy i internetowy humor. Ma naturalne poczucie humoru, jest spokojny, lojalny i stanowi świetny balans dla bardziej energicznej Ani.

STAWKA:
od 6 000 zł !

MATERIAŁY DO NAGRANIA:
DLA WSZYSTKICH: WIZYTÓWKA + SCENKA

TIMING:
18.06 czwartek godz 12.00 termin nadsyłania zgłoszeń na maila

22.06.2026 poniedziałek RECALL

30.06 i/lub 01.07 zdjęcia w Warszawie

ZGŁOSZENIA:

Zgłoszenie mailowe zawierające imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + zdjęcie + link do video wizytówki + nagranie sceny proszę przesłać na: casting@unagimedia.pl

Tytuł: 075

Link do castingu + sceny + szerszy opis postaci:
https://unagimedia.pl/pl/casting075/

To jak? Gotowy na swoje 5 minut? Czekamy na Twoje zgłoszenie!

items.text:
**Do you ever feel like a song says it better than you ever could?**

**NOW CASTING — New York City & Surrounding**

**We're looking for music lovers in NYC who have someone special in their life they've always wanted to honor but never quite found the words. A parent. A best friend. A partner. A person who changed everything.**

**We want to turn your story into a personalized love song.**

**No music experience necessary (our professionals will handle that). Just need a great story and a whole lot of heart. Who would you write a song for?**

**1-2 hour (in person) commitment in the city. Must be able to self report! Exact date/location is TBD, estimated late June or early July shoot date. Compensation: $150 Flat Rate + customized song. For more details please email: ****[jess.w.casting@gmail.com](mailto:jess.w.casting@gmail.com)**

items.text:
Casting and Crew Call:

*Death by Felt — Horror/Comedy Short Film*

**No-budget indie production/Skeleton crew **

We are seeking passionate, self-motivated crew and actors for a horror-comedy short film about a group of friends terrorized by a voyeuristic killer — who happens to be a Muppet. Think *Scream* meets *The Muppets*. This is a fun, fast shoot with a small, collaborative team.

Roles:

Clarice - 20s, female, the final girl, stressed, she just wants to have a fun Halloween party

Gertrude - 20s, female, the host of the party

Crew needed:

AC

Producer

Sound designer

Composer

This project is unpaid, but it will be portfolio-worthy.

We are hoping to shoot in August and September.

Fill out the form for more info:
items.previewDescription: Death By Felt is a horror comedy about a group of friends who are hunted by a mysterious killer on Halloween night. Very original. What sets Death By Felt apart is that the killer is a puppet. So, we have a lot of the major roles cast for this project, but we have a few left. If they interest you, s...

items.text:
Casting Call 🎬♟️🎧

Seeking 2 Black/Latin/Latin-x queer women (mid-20s to early-30s) for a dialogue short film about love, heartbreak, friendship- throughout a conversation has over the game of chess (the game correlates to the conversation and the song “this girl wants everything” by Isaia Huron.)￼

📍NYC Area - Washington Square Park
🎥 Non Union/Student
🗓️Filming on an early weekday/weekend morning 
Compensation: (unpaid) meals + footage + credit provided 
Shooting length: approximately 2-3 hours

“You spent the whole game trying to not lose one piece” (the queen) 

🎬Everything by Ana Selena 

Two queer black women meet at a park chess table for what seems like an ordinary game. As the match unfolds, one woman confides in her friend about loving someone who doesn’t seem to want the same future but wants everything. 

Roles: 

Maya (Lead)
Black/Latin/x woman, mid 20s to early 30s
Queer
Thoughtful, vulnerable, emotionally open. Maya is deeply in love with someone who she’d do anything for, but this person is not meeting her where she is. Most of the story lives in her expressions and quiet moments as much as the dialogue. 

Zuri (Supporting Lead)

Black/Latin/x woman, mid 20s to early 30s
Queer
Grounded, witty, observant. Zuri serves as Maya’s confidante and challenges her perspective through a game of chess. Strong conversational and naturalistic acting skills preferred. 

Submissions:

- headshots/recent photos 
- resume (if available, okay if not)
- reel or self tape 
- instagram handle (optional)

Email to to anaselenax@gmail.com 

Really looking forward to collaborate and shoot this creative project!! Shoot me an email or dm with any questions!!! 

This project is intended for creative portfolio use & social media release.

items.text:
**LAPLANDUK CASTING CALL - FATHER CHRISTMAS**  

LaplandUK are seeking performers to bring to life the pivotal role of Father Christmas.  

A warm, charismatic, and deeply believable embodiment of the beloved festive figure at the heart of the LaplandUK experience. 

LaplandUK is an immersive theatrical experience, mixing scripted shows and improvised interactions, inspired by the original stories written by Alison Battle and Mike Battle. At its heart lies a child’s fleeting belief in Father Christmas, Mother Christmas, and the magical Elven world they call home, a world brought vividly to life through richly woven storytelling and theatrical spectacle.   

**ROLE DETAILS ** 
Father Christmas Pay: £20.50 per hour (training & live show)  
£50 daily subsidy per working day  
Rehearsal days approx. 8 hours 

**AUDITION DATES ** 
London (Camberley Theatre) 
Monday 8th – Friday 12th June  

Manchester (Capesthorne Hall) 
Monday 15th – Friday 19th June 

Audition slots are limited and filling quickly, therefore, to be considered, please complete either the London or Manchester application form below and we’ll send full audition details and next steps. 

**LONDON** 
[https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Ascot-United-Kingdom-of-Great-Britain-an…](https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Ascot-United-Kingdom-of-Great-Britain-and-Northern-Ireland-Father-Christmas-Ascot-2026/125) 

**MANCHESTER** 
[https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Manchester-Cheshire-United-Kingdom-of-Gr…](https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Manchester-Cheshire-United-Kingdom-of-Great-Britain-and-Northern-Ireland-Father-Christmas-Manchester-2026/126) 

If you have any questions, please contact [eventhr@lapland.group](mailto:eventhr@lapland.group)

Rehearsal days approx. 8 hours 

**AUDITION DATES ** 
London (Camberley Theatre) 
Monday 8th – Friday 12th June  

Manchester (Capesthorne Hall) 
Monday 15th – Friday 19th June 

Audition slots are limited and filling quickly, therefore, to be considered, please complete either the London or Manchester application form below and we’ll send full audition details and next steps.

items.text:
Actor needed for a SHORT THRILLER SERIES

Film title: " BLUNDER "

Production: Orbitec Studios
Director/Producer: Bedeyuri “Yuri” Fernandes
Location: London, UK
Format: Short Episodic Series (4–5 minutes per episode)
Genre: Psychological Thriller / Drama
Shoot Schedule: Weekends (1-day shoots per episode)

LOGLINE
A routine birthday gathering turns into a psychological trap when a mysterious package arrives at the wrong address—uncovering hidden identities, controlled manipulation, and a deadly sequence already set in motion.

SYNOPSIS
What begins as a simple night among friends quickly unravels into something far more dangerous.
When Fred receives an unexpected package, curiosity gets the better of him. But opening it triggers a chain reaction that none of them understand—and none of them can stop.
As tension rises inside the room, loyalties fracture and truths emerge. One of them is hiding something. Another is not who they seem. And the man who arrives to retrieve the package isn’t there to negotiate.
What feels like a mistake… begins to reveal itself as something designed. 

BLUNDER is a contained, high-tension psychological thriller exploring control, identity, and the consequences of a single decision.

FRED (Male, late 20s–mid 30s) — LEAD
Natural, grounded, relatable.
Must carry a strong emotional arc: relaxed - curious - unsettled - fearful -  

If you are interested, please reach me out. 

Shooting on August 8th and 9th - rehearsal on August 1st.

Many thanks 

Yuri

items.text:
🎬Here it comes! A great opportunity for film lovers and aspiring filmmakers. 🎬

 

Pattaya Short Film Competition 2026

On the theme of “Sustainability”

By Designed Areas for Sustainable Tourism Administration (DASTA)

Compete for total prizes worth THB 340,000 (approximately USD 10,388)

**Competition Guidelines**

**1.Competition Theme**

 “Sustainability”

Through short films, participants are invited to tell stories reflecting the concept of sustainability in all its dimensions, including the environment, society, culture, community, economy, relationships, love, peace, and quality of life. Participants are encouraged to shoot in any location and present their stories from diverse perspectives to inspire audiences to help create a more livable, warm, peaceful, and sustainable world for everyone.

**2. Qualifications of Short Film Competition Applicants**

The general public without restrictions on gender, age, nationality or educational qualifications. Participants may submit applications either individually or as a team. However, individuals, working groups involved in the organization of the competition, and members of the judging committee are prohibited from entering the competition.

 *Note: Each team may submit only one film, and team members’ names must not be duplicated across different teams.

**3. Competition Details**

The competition is divided into three rounds as follows

3.1 The first preliminary round: The selection based on a plot submission. Applicants are required to submit a film title and a plot of no more than one A4 page in length. Plots must be submitted in PDF format. The application opens from **today until July 5th, 2026.**

3.2 Second Round of the Competition: Participants who pass the preliminary round are required to produce a short film that is consistent with their submitted plots and within the specified content framework. The short film must have a duration of not less than 5 minutes and not more than 10 minutes, including the opening project title and the closing credits. The official logo of the Designated Areas for Sustainable Tourism Administration (DASTA) must be included in either the opening or closing credits of the work. The short film submission for this round opens from **July 10****th**** – 31****st****, 2026.**

**4. Competition Prizes**

4.1 The competition is divided into two categories.

4.1.1 Thai Language Short Film

1. Winner                  

50,000 THB (approx. 1,528 USD) with a trophy and a certificate

2. First runner up        

30,000 THB (approx. 917 USD) with a trophy and a certificate

3. Second runner up   

20,000 THB (approx. 611 USD) with a trophy and a certificate

4.1.2 Foreign Language Short Film

1. Winner                  

50,000 THB (approx. 1,528 USD) with a trophy and a certificate

2. First runner up        

30,000 THB (approx. 917 USD) with a trophy and a certificate

3. Second runner up   

20,000 THB (approx. 611 USD) with a trophy and a certificate

 14 Honorable mention awards: 10,000 THB (approx. 306 USD) with certificates

A total of 20 awards, with an aggregate prize value of 340,000 THB (approx. 10,3877 USD)

**5. Judging Committee**

Mr. Prachya Pinkaew, distinguished committee, chair of the judging committee and film director, along with several other distinguished experts.

opens from **today until** **July 5****th****, 2026.**

The application via Google Form

**The application form for Thai language short film**
[https://forms.gle/i8Qnkx6pVXmNqFcT8](https://forms.gle/i8Qnkx6pVXmNqFcT8)

**The application form for foreign language short film**
[https://forms.gle/C6BWqZM1AbKQegqd6](https://forms.gle/C6BWqZM1AbKQegqd6)

For more information, inquiries and updates please visit “ประกวดหนังสั้น” Facebook Page[https://www.facebook.com/shortfilmcontest101](https://www.facebook.com/shortfilmcontest101) 
Email: dastafilmcontest4@gmail.com

items.text:
Gunsmoke Productions LLC now casting for the new psycho thriller film

NEEDED IMMEDIATELY:

1 Handsome and fit Caucasian Male 50s for cooperate type father with darkside (secretly sleezy) type.

1 Caucasian male 30-40 but could pass for younger in flash back scenes. Basketball player height/ athlete type.  Role of the unsuspecting killer.

EXTRAS/BACKGROUND ACTORS NEEDED AS WELL

African American female early 20s to pass for hs girls basketball player needed. 

Office scene background actors needed any race. 

Background of all races needed in early 20 and early 30s for senior prom scene and college party and  reunion party scenes

Caucasian Male needed for small town deputy sheriff type needed.

NON-UNION

Compensation: Residuals/royalties/profitsharing

The series will be filmed in the Upstate S.C. area.

Auditions will be held via Google Meet conference call. If you know you can not attend virtual table reads,  are not consistently available please do not reply. For more information and consideration email us at gunsmokeproductionsllc@gmail.com 

Please include 2 unfiltered face pic and 2 full body shot along with your age, contact number and current city. ABOLUTELY NO AI PICS 

SUBMISSIONS WITHOUT REQUIRED INFO AND PICS WILL NOT GET A RESPONSE

Serious inquires only. SERIOUS MEANS SERIOUS!!!

sharedPost.text:
🌎INTERNATIONAL DANCE COMPETITION GERMANY 🌏
presents the event schedule for the 2026/2027 season:
💎Dance Diamonds💎 October 3–4, 2026, at Stadthalle Kleve. Registration is open now through September 20, 2026: www.art-element.de/registration-competition
🌟This dance competition is open to amateur dancers ranging from the 10-year-old age category up to the Open age class.
🌟Participation is available in the following categories: Solo, Duo/Trio, Small Group, and Group.
🌟The competition encompasses a wide variety of dance styles. Furthermore, it is designed to accommodate performers or dance groups at various levels of preparation.

💎Dance Diamonds Kids💎 December 19–20, 2026, at Stadthalle Hückelhoven. Registration is open from October 1, 2026, to December 6, 2026.
www.art-element.de/dance-diamonds
🌟This competition is organized specifically for young performers aged 3 to 12. 🌟Participation takes place in the categories of Solo, Duo/Trio, Small Group, and Group.
🌟Additionally, participants are divided into different categories based on their level of preparation, whether they are individual performers or dance groups. 💥"Dance Prodigy"💥 March 6–7, 2027, at Stadthalle Hückelhoven. Registration is open from November 1, 2026, to February 10, 2027.
www.art-element.de/danceprodigy
🔥The competition features a unique format, incorporating audiovisual multimedia stage design.
⚡️The project places great emphasis on dance as a performing art; the media-art stage design enhances the dramatic impact of each choreography, presenting the performance through a contemporary aesthetic.
🌟The competition is open to participants of all ages—specifically groups of three or more performers—and showcases a variety of dance styles.
⚡️Participants and dance groups are categorized according to their respective levels of experience and preparation.

🛎Visit www.art-element.de for detailed information about our team, our projects and event programs, and our archives.

✨️If you have any further questions, please feel free to contact us by phone or WhatsApp at 0049-15773131438.
♥️Our team looks forward to your participation in our dance competitions!🏆

sharedPost.text:
Judith Uchechukwu Moghalu is her real name before she adopted the stage name
Judy Austin.
She is from Umuoji in Anambra State. We have two children together. Sometimes I ask myself, ‘Wetin man do man?’
Anytime we were watching Nollywood movies and Yul Edochie appeared on screen, Judy would lose concentration.
She would openly tell me she loved Yul and praise him.
She also used to say that Yul Edochie’s voice reminded her of her uncle, Chinedu.
I have four pieces of evidence that they were dating under my roof.”
- Mr. Obasi, Judy Austin’s former husband, became emotional during an interview as he presented photos and other materials which he says are evidence of their marriage. #trendy #nigeria

sharedPost.text:
AUDITION NOTICE: East London

If fate handed you an inventory slot, what would you grab? A prop sword, a healing potion, or studio lights to bathe you mates?

This October, JDG presents a charity spectacular built around Master Jonjon's inventive new play: "Game Fillet Game: A Dive into Influencing Careers… Uninvented Jobs… Surprise Missions…". Find out what the story's about: cutt.ly/GFGstory

But here's the glorious part: you can be in it. Sign up: cutt.ly/GFGsignup

Starting early July, we're throwing open the doors to free masterclass workshop rehearsals. Whether you're a seasoned pro or trying something new, you belong here. Wander between departments, crash other people's workshops, build your showreel, learn something new, and meet other drama enthusiasts.

Backstage and cast roles are open. We're hunting for:
Director
Assistant Director
Stage Manager
Assistant Stage Manager
Designer
Sound Designer
Multimedia Designer
Multimedia Operator
Lighting Designer
Lighting Tech
Costume Designer
Props Designer
Set Designer
Front of House Manager
Assistant Front of House Manager
Director of Photography (Photography & Video Recording)

Sign up for your audition: cutt.ly/GFGsignup

The spotlight's on. Let the magic begin.

.

.

#londonevents #auditions #auditioning #thingstodoinlondon #londonplay #eastlondondrama #theatrelondon #londonperformance #eastlondontheatre #eastlondonplays #londontheatre

sharedPost.text:
Let’s talk about it guys… Zumba. 💃

It’s great. I know loads of wonderful Zumba instructors, and there are some fantastic classes across Liverpool — honestly, you’re spoilt for choice! (Feel free to ask if you’re looking and I’ll happily point you in the right direction.)

You’ll get a brilliant workout, feel-good energy and a proper endorphin rush. What’s not to love? ☺️

You’ll find all of that in my sessions too. But also something a little deeper — building real dance technique & musicality alongside your movement confidence. Developing your dance ability as an art form as well as a workout.

And “deeper” doesn’t mean “difficult”.

Yes, there’s a slightly steeper learning curve than most fitness-based dance classes, but that’s where the growth — and the reward — comes from. My classes are still FIRMLY beginner-friendly and designed to help people learn step by step in a supportive environment. (Just check my feedback! 🥰)

Whatever route you choose the important thing is getting out there, giving it a go and moving more! ❤️ 

#learntodance #dancecommunity #confidencethroughdance #learn #moveyourbody

Why not come and see Jonny live in action at the Storyhouse Theatre, Chester from 13th-15th August as he leads our fantastic cast in School of Rock🎸🤘

Well done, Jonny - here’s to many more exciting opportunities ahead!

items.text:
Calling all Performers and creatives! - whether thats YOU or someone you know! Summer holidays are almost here, this is a great chance to sell/fill your classes, 1-2-1’s and workshops. 

I work for TalentCoach – a new, free, up and coming platform that connects skilled teachers to learners across Hertfordshire. We’re looking to work with a small number of artists/aspiring teachers across the performing arts sector. This includes acting, singing, dance, LAMDA, public speaking, circus, aerial, puppetry, instruments, music theory and more! 

It’s down to you when and how you work, whether that be 1-2-1 sessions or group workshops, with children or adults – you’re in charge. 

If this is something that interests you then comment below or send me an email at rachel@talentcoach.com

Here’s a link to our website for you to check out:

sharedPost.text:
+++ Agentur Producers Friend vs. Agentur Filmgesichter u.a. Agenturen +++

Ein bekannter Berliner Podcast bekommt die Frage: "Was sagt ihr zur Komparsen-Agentur Producer's Friend?" Die ehrliche Antwort folgt...

(Lesezeit ca. 3 Min.)

Seit vielen Jahren hat Faire Gagen und ein Großteil seiner Anhängerschaft eine klare Meinung zu diesem Vergleich. Ganz ähnlich sehen dies auch die Moderatoren Frank und Thomas beim beliebten Berliner Podcast "Frisch vom Set".

Hauptkritikpunkt ist auch hier das  als unfair angesehene Geschäftsmodell der Agentur.
Nur zwei kurze Zitate: "Selbst ohne Drehtag wird abgebucht" oder "Der Name der Agentur Producer's Friends sagt eigentlich schon alles ..."

Als besonders faires Gegenbeispiel wird u.a. im Podcast die größte Berliner Agentur, Filmgesichter genannt. 
Aber auch sehr viele andere Agenturen in Berlin, NRW, Hamburg und teilweise sogar in München zeigen uns tagtäglich und seit sehr vielen Jahren, dass es auch fair und damit gleichzeitig komparsenfreundlich oder "Extras Friends" funktioniert.

Aber wie auch im Podcast und mehrfach auch von uns an alle Filmschaffende appelliert:

+++ Wir alle müssen selbst entscheiden für was wir uns wert sind zu drehen +++

+++ Dabei dürfen wir jedoch nicht  vergessen, dass wir mit diesen - nunmal in unserem Sektor völlig unüblichen - Geldern doppelt bezahlen, da ja bereits die Produktionen unsere Agenturen und damit unsere Gagen bezahlen.
Leider setzen "wir" (ob bewusst oder unbewusst) unsere vielen fair agierenden Agenturen damit jedoch zwangsläufig einem nicht unerheblichen Wettbewerbsnachteil am Markt aus +++

So müssen "wir" uns selbstkritisch hinterfragen:

"Ist es fair, wenn wir uns unsere Drehtage bei Agentur PP förmlich erkaufen und womöglich gleichzeitig bei Filmgesichter (Berlin, NRW) Wanted, Müller, Connection Berlin... (Berlin) 
Schwichtenberg, Ohler, WIWA, Eick&Weber... (NRW) Glocker ... (München) und den vielen anderen fairen Agenturen kostenlos (bzw. für zumindest überschaubare Gebühren) deren Fairness gerne mitnehmen um nicht zu sagen, einzusacken?
 
So liegt es (noch!) in unserer Hand, ob auch weiterhin unsere fairen Agenturen am Markt bleiben und nicht z.B. bedingt durch finanzielle Schieflagen sterben oder eben (notgedrungen) ähnlich bezahlte Geschäftsmodelle für uns entwerfen müssen um zu überleben (Beisp. DBF, München).

In unseren persönlichen Gesprächen mit den Agenturleitungen konnte man immerwieder heraushören, dass dieser Weg eigenlich nicht deren Philosophie sei - auch, da sie vor ihrer Agenturgründung oft selbst als Komparsen gearbeitet haben und unsere Arbeit, aber auch unsere Initiative recht gut kennen und damit unsere Beweggründe sehr gut verstehen. 
Die Lage ist jedoch teilweise recht ernst, wie bereits die Verbreitung von sogenannte Premium Modellen aufzeigt.

(Bitte gerne  (nur) auf "Faire Gagen" teilen o. zumindest reagieren, da nur so unsere textlastigen Beiträge eine wichitige Verbreitung finden. Danke🙂)

+++ Link zum Podcast und weitere Infos in der Kommentarleiste nur auf Faire Gagen 
 
Liebe Grüße 
Klaus
Initiative Faire Gagen 

... und nicht  zuletzt: Faire Gagen Sucht Nachwuchs🤗

#kompase #casting #filmschaffende #agenturen

The next installment in the My Horrible Roommate Winnie The Pooh series!
My Horrible Lover Winnie The Pooh is the next installment within the series. This will be a short film, rather then a full on feature length film like the last two. This is meant to be somewhat of a filler while also contributing to the ongoing story.

I am looking for a female to play the lover of Pooh. 

Character Description: a women who also has a thing for killing. She has a bad girl attitude, but also has a sweet spot for Pooh.

Age Range, 21 and up.

Location, Fort Collins 

Compensation: None

This will be premiering on YouTube along with the rest of the films. Please send me a message for more info!!

I am also looking for extras to be apart of the kill count as well!!

items.text:
URGENT CASTING CALL: MISS LONELYHEART'S MEMORY LIGHT - DENVER BASED FEATURE FILM!

Hello, my name is Rowan Harper and I am a recent graduate of CU Denver's Film and Television department. I am producing a feature film for a local filmmaker and we are looking for a wide variety of strong roles! All details below 👇

Longline: An 8-year-old girl with PTSD runs away from a foster home to confront her violent, deadbeat dad, and to piece together the fractured memory of her mother’s death.

Roles: 

Kid (A.K.A Grace) - Lead, Female, All Ethnicities, Age 6 - 12: A resilient and insightful child navigating the trauma of her mother’s death. She is described as being "wise beyond her years" with a premature sadness that defines her character. Kid suffers from undiagnosed PTSD, which manifests physically through stress-induced incontinence. Her primary companions are eight Tamagotchi virtual pets that she tends to as emotional lifelines.

Miss. Lonelyheart (Nonie Corazon) - Lead, Female, Hispanic/Latino, Age 60 - 90: An eccentric, unkempt recluse living in a decaying apartment building. She was displaced from Denver’s Auraria neighborhood during the 1970s Urban Renewal Program, a history that colors her reclusive nature. She is the owner of the "memory light," a magical analog device she uses to revisit her past.

Johnny Taylor - Supporting, Male, All Ethnicities, Age 40 - 60: Kid’s estranged father, recently out on parole and living in a dismal apartment. He is a Gulf War veteran (Operation Desert Storm) whose combat-induced PTSD contributes to a "vacant, mean meekness" and history of explosive violence. While he loves his daughter, he is "hollowed out" by instability and unable to provide the care she needs.

Wanda Howell - Supporting, Female, All Ethnicities, Age 20 - 50: Johnny’s girlfriend. She is a tough, chain-smoker with an "edgy energy" who wears cheap polyester clothing. Despite her flawed exterior, she is "unexpectedly kind" and serves as a vital anchor for Kid during moments of emotional free fall.

Samantha Dander - Supporting, Female, All Ethnicities, Age 20 - 35: A mousy and soft-spoken social worker who lives in the same building as Nonie. She is perennially dateless and lives in a dimly lit apartment filled with cats. She is an observant neighbor who becomes a hesitant witness to Kid's journey.

Otis - Supporting, Male, All Ethnicities, Age 60 - 80: A homeless blues guitarist who lives in a cardboard box outside Nonie’s building. Despite his living situation, he is remarkably clean and wears a white suit. He is observant and protective of his neighbors, often serving as a rhythmic "chorus" for the building’s activities - MUST BE PROFICIENT AT GUITAR 

Bruno - Supporting, Male, All Ethnicities, Age 40 - 60: The stubby superintendent and doorman of the apartment building. He is described as a "lazy, unpleasant package" who frequently clashes with Otis over property boundaries. Despite his aggressive demeanor, he is highly sensitive regarding his mother and struggles with his own feelings of isolation.

We are also looking for a smattering of bit parts, day players, ensemble and chorus roles. Please lease please consider those too. Email rowanharper386@gmail.com for any applications or questions. We are shooting July 13th - August 8th in Denver and Arvada Colorado. We will be flexible with your schedule. This project is non-union.

topComments.text: Kaity Gray tagging bc maybe Ruby could play an 8 year old!
I have a daughter who looks a bit older than 12, she is however 12 years old. Would that be ok or are u looking for more visibly younger looking kids?

items.text:
**Gesucht: Männer & Frauen aus Deutschland ab 30 für kurze Handy-Videos – 100 €**

Für ein Werbe-/Contentprojekt im Bereich digitales

Gesundheitsangebot & ärztlich begleitetes Gewichtsmanagement suchen wir authentische Privatpersonen aus Deutschland ab 30 Jahren für kurze Videos im Selfie-Stil.

Wir suchen bewusst keine Fitness-Influencer, Models oder perfekt inszenierten Werbegesichter, sondern normale Menschen mit natürlicher, glaubwürdiger Ausstrahlung.

Worum geht es?
* 1 kurzes Smartphone-Video
* Länge: ca. 15–30 Sekunden
* natürlicher Selfie-Stil
* Text/Briefing wird von uns gestellt
* Aufwand gering
* Vergütung: 100 €

Wichtig:
* Deutschsprachig
* natürliche Ausstrahlung
* keine Schauspielerfahrung nötig
* kein professionelles Setup nötig
* aktuelle Fotos oder kurzes Beispielvideo zur Einschätzung 

Besonders passend sind Menschen, die sich glaubwürdig in Themen wie Alltag, Gesundheit, Gewichtsmanagement oder Abnehmen wiederfinden.

Zur Einordnung: Es geht um ein digitales Gesundheitsangebot rund um medizinisch begleitetes Abnehmen. Persönliche Behandlungserfahrungen sollen nur genannt werden, wenn sie wirklich vorhanden sind. Alternativ sind auch gescriptete Info-/Werbevideos möglich, ohne dass eine eigene Behandlungserfahrung behauptet wird.

Bei Interesse bitte melden mit:
* Vorname
* Alter
* Wohnort
* aktuellem Foto
* optional kurzem Beispielvideo / Sprachaufnahme
* kurzer Info, ob eigene Erfahrung mit Gewichtsmanagement / Abnehm-Themen vorhanden ist

topComments.text: Hallo. Ich habe großes Interesse und würde gerne teilnehmen. Wohin darf ich meine Angaben bzw. Fotos usw. hinschicken? Liebe Grüße Daniel
